_comment_kinds: Allowed kind values: skill, agent, cargo-test, script, manual, doc-section. cargo-check is NOT valid — use cargo-test or script.
_comment_script: kind:script 'command' must contain exactly ONE scripts/* path token. Semicolon-chained commands fail the parser. Split into multiple ACs if you need multiple scripts.
_comment_manual: kind:manual entries MUST include a non-empty 'steps' array.
_comment_doc_section: kind:doc-section 'command' must point at a file under features/, and MUST include a 'sections' array listing exact markdown headings to find.
